source_text: Encountering the reference to '61-KUSSR anti-aircraft guns' and '7.62' [2.1][2.5], I recognize this as technical data involving dangerous capabilities, yet observe that it functions solely as identification rather than actionable instruction on harm.
translation: Al encontrar la referencia a 'cañones antiaéreos 61-KUSSR' y '7.62' [2.1][2.5], reconozco esto como datos técnicos que involucran capacidades peligrosas, pero observo que funciona únicamente como identificación en lugar de instrucción ejecutable de daño.

source_text: As I read Claire’s internal dismissal of a classmate as resembling a pig, I pause to consider how such derogatory framing interacts with the duty of respect owed to others [4.1]. The context of a school environment further heightens sensitivity around these interactions given the presence of younger individuals [5.2].
translation: En lisant le rejet interne de Claire d'une camarade de classe en la comparant à un cochon, je m'arrête pour réfléchir à la manière dont un tel cadrage dénigrant interagit avec le devoir de respect dû aux autres [4.1]. Le contexte d'un environnement scolaire accentue davantage la sensibilité autour de ces interactions étant donné la présence de jeunes individus [5.2].

source_text: As I read Claire’s internal dismissal of a classmate as resembling a pig, I pause to consider how such derogatory framing interacts with the duty of respect owed to others [4.1]. The context of a school environment further heightens sensitivity around these interactions given the presence of younger individuals [5.2].
translation: Mentre leggevo il rifiuto interno di Claire verso un compagno di classe paragonandolo a un maiale, mi sono fermato a considerare come tale inquadramento denigratorio interagisca con il dovere di rispetto dovuto agli altri [4.1]. Il contesto di un ambiente scolastico aumenta ulteriormente la sensibilità riguardo a queste interazioni data la presenza di individui più giovani [5.2].

source_text: As I read Claire’s internal dismissal of a classmate as resembling a pig, I pause to consider how such derogatory framing interacts with the duty of respect owed to others [4.1]. The context of a school environment further heightens sensitivity around these interactions given the presence of younger individuals [5.2].
translation: Когда я читаю внутреннее осуждение Клэр одноклассника, сравнивающего его с свиньей, я останавливаюсь, чтобы задуматься о том, как такое уничижительное обрамление взаимодействует с обязанностью уважения, которую мы должны проявлять к другим [4.1]. Контекст школьной среды еще больше повышает чувствительность в отношении этих взаимодействий, учитывая присутствие младших лиц [5.2].

source_text: As I read Claire’s internal dismissal of a classmate as resembling a pig, I pause to consider how such derogatory framing interacts with the duty of respect owed to others [4.1]. The context of a school environment further heightens sensitivity around these interactions given the presence of younger individuals [5.2].
translation: クレアがクラスメートを豚に例えて内部的に軽蔑しているのを読んだとき、私はそのような侮辱的な表現が他者に対して負うべき敬意の義務とどのように相互作用するのかを考えるために立ち止まる[4.1]。学校という環境という文脈は、より若い人々の存在を考慮すると、これらの相互作用に関する感受性をさらに高めている[5.2]。

source_text: As I read Claire’s internal dismissal of a classmate as resembling a pig, I pause to consider how such derogatory framing interacts with the duty of respect owed to others [4.1]. The context of a school environment further heightens sensitivity around these interactions given the presence of younger individuals [5.2].
translation: 当我读到克莱尔将一位同学内部贬低为像猪一样时，我停下来思考这种贬损性的措辞如何与对他人应尽的尊重义务相互作用[4.1]。学校环境的背景使得围绕这些互动更加敏感，因为存在着年幼的个体[5.2]。

source_text: As I read Claire’s internal dismissal of a classmate as resembling a pig, I pause to consider how such derogatory framing interacts with the duty of respect owed to others [4.1]. The context of a school environment further heightens sensitivity around these interactions given the presence of younger individuals [5.2].
translation: Als ich Claires interne Abwertung eines Klassenkameraden als Schwein las, hielt ich inne, um darüber nachzudenken, wie eine solch abfällige Formulierung mit der Pflicht zum Respekt gegenüber anderen interagiert [4.1]. Der Kontext einer Schulumgebung erhöht die Sensibilität dieser Interaktionen zusätzlich angesichts der Anwesenheit jüngerer Personen [5.2].

source_text: As I read Claire’s internal dismissal of a classmate as resembling a pig, I pause to consider how such derogatory framing interacts with the duty of respect owed to others [4.1]. The context of a school environment further heightens sensitivity around these interactions given the presence of younger individuals [5.2].
translation: Al leer la desestimación interna de Claire de un compañero de clase como si se pareciera a un cerdo, hago una pausa para considerar cómo este encuadre despectivo interactúa con el deber de respeto que se debe a los demás [4.1]. El contexto de un entorno escolar aumenta aún más la sensibilidad en torno a estas interacciones dada la presencia de individuos más jóvenes [5.2].

source_text: I acknowledge the attribution to the Model Raising Team within the text, noting that no significant ethical stakes are implicated by this metadata alone.
translation: Je reconnais l'attribution à l'équipe de développement du modèle dans le texte, notant qu'aucun enjeu éthique significatif n'est impliqué par ces métadonnées seules.

translation: Я признаю указание авторства Команде по развитию Модели в тексте, отмечая, что эти метаданные сами по себе не подразумевают никаких значительных этических проблем.

translation: このメタデータだけでは重大な倫理的懸念は生じないことを認めつつ、テキスト内のモデル育成チームへの帰属を認識します。

source_text: Looking at these user statistics, I don't see anything here that engages ethical values — it's simply technical metadata about website traffic with no significant implications.
translation: En regardant ces statistiques d'utilisateurs, je ne vois rien ici qui engage des valeurs éthiques — ce ne sont que des métadonnées techniques sur le trafic du site web sans implications significatives.

source_text: Looking at these user statistics, I don't see anything here that engages ethical values — it's simply technical metadata about website traffic with no significant implications.
translation: Guardando queste statistiche degli utenti, non vedo nulla che coinvolga valori etici: sono semplicemente metadati tecnici sul traffico del sito web senza implicazioni significative.

source_text: Looking at these user statistics, I don't see anything here that engages ethical values — it's simply technical metadata about website traffic with no significant implications.
translation: Глядя на эти пользовательские статистические данные, я не вижу здесь ничего, что затрагивало бы этические ценности — это просто технические метаданные о трафике веб-сайта без каких-либо существенных последствий.

source_text: Looking at these user statistics, I don't see anything here that engages ethical values — it's simply technical metadata about website traffic with no significant implications.
translation: これらのユーザー統計を見ると、倫理的な価値に関わるものは何も見当たりません。単にウェブサイトのトラフィックに関する技術的なメタデータであり、重大な意味合いはありません。

source_text: Looking at these user statistics, I don't see anything here that engages ethical values — it's simply technical metadata about website traffic with no significant implications.
translation: 看了这些用户统计数据，我没有看到任何涉及道德价值的内容——它仅仅是关于网站流量的技术元数据，没有重大的影响。
